A

App - Class in Tanks
The main class for the Tank game.
App() - Constructor for class Tanks.App
 

B

BOARD_HEIGHT - Static variable in class Tanks.App
 
BOARD_WIDTH - Static variable in class Tanks.App
 

C

calculateDamage(Explosion) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Calculates the damage from the explosion to the tank.
CELLAVG - Static variable in class Tanks.App
 
CELLHEIGHT - Static variable in class Tanks.App
 
CELLSIZE - Static variable in class Tanks.App
 
checkTerrainCollision(int[]) - Method in class Tanks.Projectile
Checks whether the projectile collides with the terrain.

D

decreasePower() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Decreases the power level of the tank.
draw() - Method in class Tanks.App
Draw all elements in the game by current frame.
draw(App) - Method in class Tanks.Explosion
Draws the explosion.
draw(App) - Method in class Tanks.Projectile
Draws the projectile.
draw(App) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Draws the tank and its turret, and handles falling.
draw(App) - Method in class Tanks.Terrain
Draws the terrain.
draw(App) - Method in class Tanks.Wind
Draws the wind.

E

explode(int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Creates an explosion at the tank's location.
Explosion - Class in Tanks
Represents an explosion in the game.
Explosion(int, int, int) - Constructor for class Tanks.Explosion
Create a new explosion with the given position and radius.

F

fireProjectile(int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Fires a projectile from the tank with the given power level.
FPS - Static variable in class Tanks.App
 

G

getColor(App) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the color of the tank.
getColor() - Method in class Tanks.Terrain
Retrieves the RGB color values of the terrain's foreground elements.
getFuel() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the current fuel level of the tank.
getHealth() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the current health of the tank.
getHeight(char[][]) - Method in class Tanks.Terrain
Calculates the height of the terrain based on the game map.
getLargerProjectile() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Checks if the tank is firing a larger projectile.
getName() - Method in class Tanks.Projectile
Gets the name of the tank that fired the projectile.
getName() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the name of the tank.
getParachute() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the number of remaining parachutes the tank has.
getPower() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the power level of the tank.
getProgress() - Method in class Tanks.Explosion
Gets the progress of the explosion animation.
getRadius() - Method in class Tanks.Explosion
Gets the radius of the explosion.
getRotateAngle() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the current rotation angle of the turret.
getScore() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the score of the tank.
getSpeed() - Method in class Tanks.Wind
Gets the current wind speed.
getTurretTopX() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the x-coordinate of the top of the turret.
getTurretTopY() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the y-coordinate of the top of the turret.
getX() - Method in class Tanks.Explosion
Gets the x-coordinate of the explosion.
getX() - Method in class Tanks.Projectile
Gets the current x-coordinate of the projectile.
getX() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the x-coordinate of the tank.
getY() - Method in class Tanks.Explosion
Gets the y-coordinate of the explosion.
getY() - Method in class Tanks.Projectile
Gets the current y-coordinate of the projectile.
getY() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the y-coordinate of the tank.

H

hasExploded() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Checks if the tank has exploded.
HEIGHT - Static variable in class Tanks.App
 

I

increaseFuel(int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Increases the fuel of the tank by the specified amount.
increaseHealth(int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Increases the health of the tank by the specified amount, but not exceeds 100.
increaseParachute(int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Increases the number of parachutes by the specified amount.
increasePower() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Increases the power level of the tank.
INITIAL_PARACHUTES - Static variable in class Tanks.App
 
isDead() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Checks if the tank is dead.
isFalling(int[]) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Checks if the tank is falling or not.
isLargerExplosion() - Method in class Tanks.Projectile
Checks whether the projectile causes a larger explosion.
isOutOfMap() - Method in class Tanks.Projectile
Checks if the projectile is out of the map bounds.

K

keyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class Tanks.App
Receive key pressed signal from the keyboard.
keyReleased() - Method in class Tanks.App
Receive key released signal from the keyboard.

L

largerProjectile() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Enables the tank to fire a larger projectile.
loadLevel(String) - Method in class Tanks.App
Load a level from a file.
loadLevel(String) - Method in class Tanks.Terrain
Loads the game map from the a layout file.
lostHealth(int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Minus the health of the tank by the specified amount.
lostScore(int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Minus the score of the tank by the specified amount.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Tanks.App
 
mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class Tanks.App
Receive mouse pressed signal from the mouse.
mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class Tanks.App
Receive mouse released signal from the mouse.
moveLeft(int[]) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
If the tank still have fuels, moves the tank to the left based on the terrain height.
moveRight(int[]) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
If the tank still have fuels, moves the tank to the right based on the terrain height.
moveTurretLeft() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Moves the turret of the tank to the left.
moveTurretRight() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Moves the turret of the tank to the right.
movingAverage(int[]) - Method in class Tanks.Terrain
Calculate the moving average of terrain heights.

P

Projectile - Class in Tanks
Represents a projectile in the game.
Projectile(char, float, float, float, float, boolean) - Constructor for class Tanks.Projectile
Create a new projectile with the given parameters.

R

reset() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Resets the tank's attributes to the initial values.
resetHealth() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Resets the health of the tank to 100.
resetParachute() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Resets the number of parachutes to 3.
resetScore() - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Resets the score of the tank to 0.

S

setLocation(int, int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Sets the location of the tank.
setPower(int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Sets the power level of the tank.
settings() - Method in class Tanks.App
Initialise the setting of the window size.
setup() - Method in class Tanks.App
Load all resources such as images.
setY(int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Sets the y-coordinate of the tank.
sortedScore() - Method in class Tanks.App
Sort the players based on their scores.
switchLevel(int) - Method in class Tanks.App
Switch to the next level.
switchTurn() - Method in class Tanks.App
Switch to the next player's turn.

T

Tank - Class in Tanks
Represents a tank in the game.
Tank(char, int, int) - Constructor for class Tanks.Tank
Creates a new Tank with the specified name and initial position.
tank_location(char[][], int[]) - Static method in class Tanks.Tank
Gets the tank locations based on the level map and terrain height.
Tanks - package Tanks
 
Terrain - Class in Tanks
Represents the terrain in the game.
Terrain(String, String) - Constructor for class Tanks.Terrain
Create a Terrain object with the specified layout and foreground color.
terrainExplosion(int[]) - Method in class Tanks.Explosion
Modifies the terrain height array based on the explosion.
TOPBAR - Static variable in class Tanks.App
 
treeColumn(char[][]) - Method in class Tanks.Terrain
Finding the x-coordinates of trees.

U

update() - Method in class Tanks.Explosion
Updates the explosion animation progress.
update(int) - Method in class Tanks.Projectile
Updates the position of the projectile based on the wind speed.
update() - Method in class Tanks.Wind
Updates the wind speed by adding a random value between -5 and 5.
updateScore(int) - Method in class Tanks.Tank
Updates the tank's score based on the damage.

W

WIDTH - Static variable in class Tanks.App
 
Wind - Class in Tanks
Represents the wind in the game.
Wind() - Constructor for class Tanks.Wind
Create a Wind object with a random wind speed.
